ready_high_confidence.label: Ready - high confidence
ready_high_confidence.site_behavior: Use in recommendation lists with normal caveats.
ready_high_confidence.rule_summary: Confirmed roster player with both high-confidence club performance and national-team qualifier usage.

ready_medium_confidence.label: Ready - medium confidence
ready_medium_confidence.site_behavior: Use in recommendation lists, but show roster/source caveats when relevant.
ready_medium_confidence.rule_summary: Strong player signal but either roster status is preliminary, or only one of club/national signals is available for a confirmed player.

usable_low_confidence.label: Usable - low confidence
usable_low_confidence.site_behavior: Use for watchlists, depth options, and fallback advice, not top recommendations.
usable_low_confidence.rule_summary: One usable signal is present, but roster status or source depth makes confidence lower.

needs_review.label: Needs review
needs_review.site_behavior: Do not use for confident recommendations until identity, roster, or weak-source issues are checked.
needs_review.rule_summary: The player has review-only data, caps-only data, missing position, or a roster status that needs manual checking.

insufficient_data.label: Insufficient data
insufficient_data.site_behavior: Hide from recommendation lists unless the user explicitly wants all roster players.
insufficient_data.rule_summary: No usable high-confidence club signal and no matched national-team qualifier usage.

rule_notes: This tier file is not final fantasy advice; it tells the site how safe each player is to use in the next recommendation model.
Confirmed players with both high-confidence club data and national-team qualifier usage are high confidence.
Preliminary players with strong data are medium confidence until final squads are re-checked.
One-signal players can be medium or low depending on roster confidence.
Review-only, caps-only, missing-position, and needs-check roster rows are held out of confident recommendation ranking.
